## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Submit query '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 122, Edge 121)
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15)
- **Backend version:** (check `/api/health`)
- **Memory backend:** (local / redis / etc.)

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant logs.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
